name: codex-transcript
description: Inspect, query, export, and render Codex session logs through the local codex-transcript CLI.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect Codex sessions with a lossless local CLI.
interface.longDescription: Codex Transcript gives agents concise guidance for discovering, querying, exporting, and rendering Codex session logs without discarding unknown events or subagent relationships.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $codex-transcript to inspect this Codex session and return compact evidence.
